$comment: Curated static selection for support-inbox-01. inbox-communication-01 supplies the triage baseline (conversation-triage-list + comment-thread); the implementation adds per-conversation message threads, search and status filtering, a list/grid view toggle, a guarded reply that reopens and claims the conversation, assign/snooze/close/reopen lifecycle actions, a New conversation Dialog, and localStorage persistence with a Reset inbox action.

assumptions: inbox-communication-01 is the stocked inbox-communication screen pattern and its triage-plus-thread topology fits the application.

conversation-triage-list-01 and comment-thread-01 are reused unchanged; per-conversation threads, the view toggle, the New conversation Dialog, and the thread-header lifecycle controls are composed around them by the application.
All conversations, threads, and counts derive from one local seed set plus localStorage-persisted replies, lifecycle changes, and additions.
risks: No messaging platform, real-time transport, or backend persistence is connected; state lives in this browser's localStorage only.
Assignment is a single-operator toggle (You or Unassigned) rather than a real teammate roster, and there is no notification or presence transport.
Clearing site data or using a different browser loses the inbox; Reset inbox is the only recovery path back to the seed.
